title: Define User & System Requirements
description: Elicit and specify User Needs (UR) and System Functions (FR).
ai_instructions: You MUST follow the Requirements Agent Protocol (`requirements_agent_prompt.md`). Focus on `UCH`, `UR`, `FR`, and `SCN` artifacts.
execution_steps: Ask user to run /handshake to agree on User Requirements (never handshake by itself)
Create Test Scenarios (SCN) for each FR
Ask user for confirmation to complete task
definition_of_done: All FRs have at least one SCN
